resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def haveConflict(self, event1: List[str], event2: List[str]) -> bool:
        e1_start, e1_end = map(lambda x: int(x[:2]) * 60 + int(x[3:]), event1)
        e2_start, e2_end = map(lambda x: int(x[:2]) * 60 + int(x[3:]), event2)
        return e1_start < e2_end and e1_end > e2_start
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution converts the event times from HH:MM format to minutes since midnight. It then compares the start and end times of the two events to determine if there is an overlap.
